descriptionByLocale.it: Cioccolato fresco di alta qualità – questo è ciò che rappresenta la manifattura svizzera di cioccolato Läderach. Fondata nel 1962, l'azienda familiare oggi impiega oltre 2500 persone da più di 80 paesi, con una tendenza in aumento. La sede centrale dell'azienda si trova nel cantone di Glarus. Con il panorama alpino come sfondo, produciamo qui i nostri cioccolati freschi e sviluppiamo costantemente nuove idee innovative in team agili. L'area aziendale «Retail» comprende oltre 230 chocolaterie in più di 25 paesi. Qui offriamo le nostre specialità di cioccolato e invitiamo i clienti a vivere sempre di nuovo l'esperienza del cioccolato fresco. Vuoi farne parte anche tu? Allora vieni da noi. Questo ti aspetta * Supporti la direzione della filiale nella gestione quotidiana e nell'organizzazione della filiale * Offri una consulenza competente e orientata al cliente e supporti nella scelta dei regali del nostro vasto assortimento di prodotti * Ti occupi della presentazione accattivante del nostro ampio assortimento di confetteria e cioccolato, tra l'altro attraverso la creazione di negozi creativi * Garantisci la qualità superiore e attui i nostri alti standard in modo coerente * Sei una persona di riferimento importante per il team e per i clienti * Contribui alla ottimizzazione dei processi di lavoro e assicurati che la filiale lavori in modo efficiente e redditizio Questo è ciò che porti con te * Hai completato una formazione nel commercio al dettaglio e/o hai esperienze paragonabili nella gestione di prodotti alimentari * Hai una certa esperienza di leadership, preferibilmente con team più grandi, e hai completato il corso di formazione professionale * Ami un'impostazione pratica e sei tecnicamente affine * Sei propenso all'ottimizzazione e disponi di un pensiero imprenditoriale * Hai una coscienza della qualità e dell'igiene eccezionale * Valuti la comunicazione aperta e rispettosa e parli tedesco e inglese in modo sicuro; conoscenze in francese e altre lingue sono un vantaggio ulteriore * Non hai paura di orari di lavoro flessibili (aperti 365 giorni) e sei disponibile anche nei fine settimana, sabato, domenica o festivi Questo è ciò che ti offriamo * Un ambiente di lavoro stimolante con colleghi motivati * Una posizione con molta responsabilità * La possibilità di portare avanti idee fresche * Una cultura del feedback aperta e rispettosa * Formazione interna ed esterna * Opportunità di carriera individuali * Sconti generosi sui nostri prodotti * Cioccolato sul posto di lavoro * Buona accessibilità delle sedi Own it. Grow it. Make it fresh. Sembra interessante? Allora candidati presso di noi. Andrea Gfeller, direttrice della filiale, telefono +41 41 412 02 60, è a disposizione per rispondere alle tue domande. Preghiamo di notare che non considereremo le agenzie di lavoro esterne per la copertura di questa posizione.
descriptionByLocale.en: High-quality fresh chocolate – that's what the Swiss chocolate manufacturer Läderach stands for. Founded in 1962, the family-owned company today employs over 2500 people from more than 80 countries, with a growing trend. The company's headquarters are located in the canton of Glarus. Against a picturesque Alpine backdrop, we produce our fresh chocolates here and constantly develop new, innovative ideas in agile teams. The «Retail» business unit includes over 230 chocolateries in over 25 countries. Here, we offer our chocolate specialties and invite customers to experience fresh chocolate again and again. Do you want to be part of it? Then come to us. This is what you can expect * You support the branch management in the daily leadership and organization of the branch * You offer competent, customer-oriented advice and support in selecting gifts from our diverse range of products * You ensure the appealing presentation of our extensive confectionery and chocolate assortment, including through creative store design * You guarantee top quality and consistently implement our high standards * You are an important contact person for the team and for customers * You contribute to the optimization of work processes and ensure that the branch works efficiently and profitably This is what you bring with you * You have completed retail training and/or have comparable experience in handling food * You have initial leadership experience, preferably with larger teams, and have completed the vocational training course * You love a hands-on mentality and are technically affine * You are optimization-oriented and have an entrepreneurial thinking * You have an exceptional quality and hygiene awareness * You appreciate open and respectful communication and speak German and English safely; knowledge of French and other languages is an additional advantage * You have no problem with flexible working hours (open 365 days) and are also on board on weekends, Saturdays, Sundays, or public holidays This is what we offer you * A stimulating work environment with motivated colleagues * A position with a lot of responsibility * The opportunity to bring fresh ideas * An open and respectful feedback culture * Internal and external training * Individual career opportunities * Generous discounts on our products * Chocolate at the workplace * Good accessibility of the locations Own it. Grow it. Make it fresh. Sounds interesting? Then apply to us. Andrea Gfeller, branch manager, phone +41 41 412 02 60, is happy to answer your questions. Please note that we will not consider external personnel agencies for the filling of this position.
descriptionByLocale.de: Hochwertige frische Schokolade – dafür steht die Schweizer Schokoladenmanufaktur Läderach. 1962 gegründet, beschäftigt das Familienunternehmen heute gruppenweit über 2500 Menschen aus mehr als 80 Ländern, Tendenz steigend. Der Hauptsitz des Unternehmens liegt im Kanton Glarus. Vor malerischer Alpenkulisse produzieren wir hier unsere frischen Schokoladen und entwickeln in agilen Teams ständig neue, innovative Ideen. Der Unternehmensbereich «Retail» umfasst über 230 Chocolaterien in über 25 Ländern. Hier bieten wir unsere Schokoladenspezialitäten an und laden Kundinnen und Kunden ein, frische Schokolade immer wieder neu zu erleben. Willst auch du daran teilhaben? Dann komm zu uns. Das erwartet dich • Du unterstützt die Filialleitung bei der täglichen Führung und Organisation der Filiale • Du bietest eine kompetente, kundenorientierte Beratung und unterstützt bei der Auswahl von Geschenken aus unserem vielfältigen Warensortiment • Du sorgst für die ansprechende Präsentation unseres umfangreichen Confiserie- und Schokoladensortiments, unter anderem durch kreative Ladengestaltung • Du garantierst Spitzenqualität und setzt unsere hohen Standards konsequent um • Du bist eine wichtige Ansprechperson für das Team und für die Kundinnen und Kunden • Du trägst zur Optimierung von Arbeitsabläufen bei und stellst sicher, dass die Filiale effizient und profitabel arbeitet Das bringst du mit • Du hast eine Ausbildung im Detailhandel abgeschlossen und/oder bringst vergleichbare Erfahrungen im Umgang mit Lebensmitteln mit • Du bringst erste Führungserfahrung mit, vorzugsweise von grösseren Teams und hast den Berufsbilderkurs absolviert • Du liebst eine Hands-on-Mentalität und bist technisch affin • Du bist optimierungsfreudig und verfügst über ein unternehmerisches Denken • Du hast ein ausserordentliches Qualitäts- und Hygienebewusstsein • Du schätzt eine offene und respektvolle Kommunikation und beherrschst Deutsch und Englisch sicher; Kenntnisse in Französisch und weiteren Sprachen sind ein zusätzlicher Vorteil • Du hast keine Scheu vor flexiblen Arbeitszeiten (365 Tage geöffnet) und bist auch an Wochenenden, Samstagen, Sonntagen oder Feiertagen voll dabei Das bieten wir dir • Ein spannendes Arbeitsumfeld mit motivierten Kolleginnen und Kollegen • Eine Position mit viel Eigenverantwortung • Die Möglichkeit, frische Ideen einzubringen • Eine offene und respektvolle Feedbackkultur • Interne und externe Weiterbildungen • Individuelle Karrieremöglichkeiten • Grosszügige Rabatte auf unsere Produkte • Schokolade am Arbeitsplatz • Gute Erreichbarkeit der Standorte Own it. Grow it. Make it fresh. Klingt interessant? Dann bewirb dich bei uns. Andrea Gfeller, Filialleiterin, Telefon +41 41 412 02 60, steht dir bei Fragen gern zur Verfügung. Wir bitten um Verständnis, dass wir bei der Besetzung dieser Position keine externen Personalvermittlungen berücksichtigen.

des connaissances en français et d'autres langues sont un avantage supplémentaire * Tu n'as pas de problème avec des heures de travail flexibles (ouverts 365 jours) et tu es également à bord les week-ends, les samedis, les dimanches ou les jours fériés Voici ce que nous t'offrons * Un environnement de travail stimulant avec des collègues motivés * Une position avec beaucoup de responsabilité * La possibilité de faire avancer des idées fraîches * Une culture du feedback ouverte et respectueuse * Formation interne et externe * Opportunités de carrière individuelles * Réductions généreuses sur nos produits * Chocolat sur le lieu de travail * Bonne accessibilité des lieux Own it. descriptionByLocale.it: Cioccolato fresco di alta qualità - è questo che il produttore di cioccolato svizzero Läderach rappresenta. Fondata nel 1962, l'azienda familiare impiega ora oltre 3000 persone provenienti da più di 80 paesi in tutto il gruppo, e la tendenza è in aumento. La sede centrale dell'azienda si trova nel cantone di Glarus. Qui, contro uno sfondo alpino pittoresco, produciamo i nostri cioccolati freschi e sviluppiamo costantemente nuove idee innovative in team agili. L'unità commerciale Retail comprende più di 250 cioccolaterie in più di 30 paesi. Qui offriamo le nostre specialità di cioccolato e invitiamo i clienti a sperimentare il cioccolato fresco in modi sempre nuovi. Vuoi farne parte anche tu? Vieni e unisciti a noi. ## Mansioni - Supporti il responsabile del negozio. - Gestisci il negozio in assenza del responsabile del negozio. - Guidi con l'esempio sul pavimento del negozio per creare un'esperienza cliente eccezionale e coinvolgente. - Motivi, consigli e coach gli associati alle vendite. - Supporti nella formazione e nell'onboarding di un team vincente. - Coordini le operazioni quotidiane. - Assicuri che i protocolli di sicurezza alimentare e tutti gli altri requisiti normativi di salute e sicurezza siano osservati. - Effettui ordini settimanali e stagionali e assicurati di avere livelli di scorta corretti. - Programmi il personale per ottimizzare il servizio clienti e la gestione dei costi del personale. - Sovrintendi alla corretta conservazione e cura del magazzino, implementando FIFO nel negozio e nel magazzino. - Assicuri che il tuo negozio abbia un aspetto fantastico, in linea con le linee guida di visual merchandising del marchio. ## Requisiti - Hai esperienza in un ruolo simile in un negozio di vendita al dettaglio premium o di lusso. - Ami interagire con i clienti. Dai un grande esempio al resto del team con la tua mentalità pratica, entusiasmo e passione per fornire un'esperienza cliente fantastica. - Hai una solida comprensione e esperienza lavorativa con KPI di vendita al dettaglio comunemente utilizzati (ad esempio tasso di conversione, ATV, ecc.). - Sei imprenditoriale, pratico e hai una mentalità focalizzata sulle soluzioni. - Sei ambizioso e orientato ai risultati. - Hai dimostrato la capacità di sviluppare e far crescere sia un team che un'azienda. - Sei ben organizzato, orientato ai dettagli con la capacità di multitasking. - Sei in grado di priorizzare e delegare efficacemente. - Sei flessibile quando si tratta di lavorare nel fine settimana, sera e feste come necessario. - Sei esperto nell'uso di MS Office e diversi sistemi POS. - Hai un'eccellente comunicazione scritta e verbale in inglese (un'altra lingua è un vantaggio ma non necessaria). - Ami il cioccolato e sei appassionato di cibo raffinato. ## Cosa offriamo - Schema di bonus - Un ambiente di lavoro entusiasmante con colleghi motivati - Una posizione con molta responsabilità personale - L'opportunità di contribuire con idee fresche - Una cultura del feedback aperta e rispettosa - Formazione interna e ulteriore - Opportunità di carriera uniche - Sconti generosi sui nostri prodotti - Cioccolato al lavoro - Posizioni facilmente accessibili ## Contatto Sembra interessante? Quindi inviaci la tua candidatura.
descriptionByLocale.en: Descrizione High-quality fresh chocolate - that's what the Swiss chocolate manufacturer Läderach stands for. Founded in 1962, the family business now employs over 3000 people from more than 80 countries across the group, and the trend is rising. The company's headquarters are located in the canton of Glarus. Here, against a picturesque Alpine backdrop, we produce our fresh chocolates and are constantly developing new, innovative ideas in agile teams. The Retail business unit comprises more than 250 chocolateries in more than 30 countries. Here we offer our chocolate specialties and invite customers to experience fresh chocolate in ever new ways. Want to be part of it too? Come and join us. ## Mansioni - You support the Store Manager. - You manage the store in the absence of the Store Manager. - You lead by example on the shop floor to create an outstanding and engaging in-store customer experience. - You motivate, mentor, and coach sales associates. - You support in training and onboarding a winning team. - You coordinate day-to-day operations. - You ensure proper food safety protocol and all other Health & Safety regulatory requirements are observed. - You place weekly and seasonal orders and ensure correct stock levels. - You schedule staff to optimise customer service and personnel cost management. - You oversee proper stockroom storage and care, by implementing FIFO in-store and in the stockroom. - You make sure your store looks great, in line with the brand’s visual merchandising guidelines. ## Requisiti - You have experience in a similar role in a premium or luxury retail store. - You love interacting with customers. You set a great example for the rest of the team with your hands-on mentality, enthusiasm, and passion for delivering a fantastic customer experience. - You have firm understanding of, and experience working with, commonly used retail KPIs (e.g. conversion rate, ATV, etc..) - You are entrepreneurial, hands-on and have solutions-focus mindset. - You are ambitious and results driven. - You have proven ability to develop and grow both a team and business. - You are well organised, detail oriented with the ability to multi-task. - You are able to effectively prioritise and delegate. - You are flexible when it comes to working weekends, evenings and holidays as necessary. - You are proficient in the use of MS Office and different POS systems. - You have excellent written and verbal communication in English (another language is a plus but not necessary). - You love chocolate and are passionate about fine food. ## Cosa offriamo - Bonus scheme - An exciting working environment with motivated colleagues - A position with lots of personal responsibility - The opportunity to contribute fresh ideas - An open and respectful feedback culture - In-house and further training - Unique career opportunities - Generous discounts on our products - Chocolate at work - Easily accessible locations ## Contatto Sounds interesting? Then send us your application.
descriptionByLocale.de: Hochwertige frische Schokolade - das ist, wofür der Schweizer Schokoladenhersteller Läderach steht. Gegründet 1962, beschäftigt das Familienunternehmen heute über 3000 Mitarbeiter aus mehr als 80 Ländern im Konzern, und der Trend ist steigend. Der Hauptsitz des Unternehmens befindet sich im Kanton Glarus. Hier produzieren wir unsere frischen Schokoladen gegen eine malerische Alpenkulisse und entwickeln ständig neue, innovative Ideen in agilen Teams. Die Retail-Geschäftseinheit umfasst mehr als 250 Chocolaterien in mehr als 30 Ländern. Hier bieten wir unsere Schokoladenspezialitäten an und laden Kunden ein, frische Schokolade auf immer neue Weise zu erleben. Möchtest du auch Teil davon sein? Komm und schließe dich uns an. ## Aufgaben - Du unterstützt den Store-Manager. - Du leitest den Store in Abwesenheit des Store-Managers. - Du führst auf dem Shopfloor vor, um eine herausragende und ansprechende In-Store-Kundenexperience zu schaffen. - Du motivierst, mentorst und coachst die Verkäufer. - Du unterstützt bei der Ausbildung und Onboarding eines Gewinnerteams. - Du koordinierst den täglichen Betrieb. - Du sorgst dafür, dass die richtigen Lebensmittelsicherheitsprotokolle und alle anderen Gesundheits- und Sicherheitsanforderungen eingehalten werden. - Du gibst wöchentliche und saisonale Bestellungen auf und sorgst dafür, dass die Lagerbestände korrekt sind. - Du planst das Personal, um den Kundenservice und die Personalkosten zu optimieren. - Du überwachst die ordnungsgemäße Lagerung und Pflege des Lagerraums, indem du FIFO im Store und im Lager implementierst. - Du sorgst dafür, dass dein Store großartig aussieht, im Einklang mit den visuellen Merchandising-Richtlinien der Marke. ## Anforderungen - Du hast Erfahrung in einer ähnlichen Rolle in einem Premium- oder Luxus-Einzelhandelsgeschäft. - Du liebst es, mit Kunden zu interagieren. Du gibst ein großartiges Beispiel für den Rest des Teams mit deiner praktischen Mentalität, deinem Enthusiasmus und deiner Leidenschaft für die Lieferung einer fantastischen Kundenexperience. - Du hast ein festes Verständnis von und Erfahrung mit gängigen Einzelhandel-KPIs (z.B. Konversionsrate, ATV usw.). - Du bist unternehmerisch, praktisch und hast eine lösungsorientierte Denkweise. - Du bist ambitioniert und ergebnisorientiert. - Du hast nachgewiesen, dass du ein Team und ein Unternehmen entwickeln und wachsen lassen kannst. - Du bist gut organisiert, detailorientiert mit der Fähigkeit, mehrere Aufgaben gleichzeitig zu erledigen. - Du bist in der Lage, effektiv zu priorisieren und zu delegieren. - Du bist flexibel, wenn es darum geht, an Wochenenden, Abenden und Feiertagen zu arbeiten, wenn nötig. - Du bist erfahren im Umgang mit MS Office und verschiedenen POS-Systemen. - Du hast ausgezeichnete schriftliche und mündliche Kommunikationsfähigkeiten in Englisch (eine andere Sprache ist ein Plus, aber nicht erforderlich). - Du liebst Schokolade und bist leidenschaftlich an hochwertigen Lebensmitteln interessiert. ## Was wir bieten - Bonus-System - Eine aufregende Arbeitsumgebung mit motivierten Kollegen - Eine Position mit viel persönlicher Verantwortung - Die Möglichkeit, frische Ideen beizutragen - Eine offene und respektvolle Feedback-Kultur - Interne und weitere Schulung - Einzigartige Karrierechancen - Großzügige Rabatte auf unsere Produkte - Schokolade am Arbeitsplatz - Leicht zugängliche Standorte ## Kontakt Klingt interessant? Dann sende uns deine Bewerbung.

Prima del pittoresco paesaggio alpino produciamo i nostri cioccolatini freschi qui e sviluppiamo costantemente nuove idee innovative nelle squadre agili. Crescete. Rendilo fresco. Sembra interessante? Allora ti faremo coinvolgere. Fritz Steinmann, Department Manager Global Supply Chain, è a vostra disposizione per domande. Chiediamo una comprensione che non prendiamo in considerazione i posizionamenti esterni del personale durante l'occupazione di questa posizione.
descriptionByLocale.en: Descrizione High quality fresh chocolate – this is the Swiss chocolate manufacturer Läderach. Founded in 1962, the family business today employs more than 2500 people from more than 80 countries, tending to rise. The company is headquartered in the canton of Glarus. Before picturesque alpine scenery we produce our fresh chocolates here and constantly develop new, innovative ideas in agile teams. High-quality fresh chocolate – the Swiss chocolate manufacturer Läderach stands for it. Founded in 1962, the family business today employs more than 2,500 people from more than 80 countries, increasing trend. The company is headquartered in the canton of Glarus. Before picturesque alpine scenery we produce our fresh chocolates here and constantly develop new, innovative ideas in agile teams. In our production we produce fresh couvertures from high-quality raw materials. We then process and refine the liquid chocolates in our chocolate factory to FreshSchoggi, Pralinés, Truffes, Figurines and more. Do you want to participate? Then come to us.

# Mansioni
- You work where handmade chocolate becomes a real experience – every piece goes through your hands
- You experience a lively environment in high seasons (e.g. before Christmas/Easter), support the team for longer or Saturdays and see what you create together
- You pack chocolate specialities by hand
- You check each piece on optics and quality
- You make sure that packaging and details work perfectly
- You keep hygiene rules and carefully deal with the products

##
- You work carefully and pay attention to every detail
- You are reliable and consistently maintains hygiene regulations
- You are flexible and support the team in high season even longer or Saturdays
- You speak German and can communicate well in the team

- An exciting working environment with motivated colleagues
- A position with great responsibility
- The opportunity to introduce fresh ideas
- An open and respectful feedback culture
- Internal and external training
- Individual career opportunities
- Generous discounts on our products

- Free parking
- Benefits in the Läderach Café and staff restaurant

descriptionByLocale.fr: Descrizione Chocolat frais de haute qualité – voici le fabricant suisse de chocolat Läderach. Fondée en 1962, l'entreprise familiale emploie aujourd'hui plus de 2 500 personnes de plus de 80 pays, ce qui tend à augmenter. La société est basée dans le canton de Glarus. Avant les paysages alpins pittoresques, nous produisons ici nos chocolats frais et développons constamment de nouvelles idées innovantes en équipe agile. Dans notre production, nous produisons des couvertures fraîches à partir de matières premières de haute qualité. Nous traitons ensuite et perfectionnons les chocolats liquides dans notre chocolaterie à FreshSchoggi, Pralinés, Truffes, Figurines et plus encore. Voulez-vous participer? Fais-le frais. Ça semble intéressant ? Alors on va vous impliquer. Ajdin Konjic, chef de département Bags/Ships, est à votre disposition pour les questions. Nous demandons que l'on comprenne que nous ne prenons pas en compte les affectations de personnel externe lorsqu'on occupe ce poste.

descriptionByLocale.en: ## Descrizione High-quality fresh chocolate - that's what the Swiss chocolate manufacturer Läderach stands for. Founded in 1962, the family business now employs over 2500 people from more than 80 countries across the group, and the trend is rising. The company's headquarters are located in the canton of Glarus. Here, against a picturesque Alpine backdrop, we produce our fresh chocolates and are constantly developing new, innovative ideas in agile teams. Our Corporate Functions business unit encompasses a wide range of activities. Alongside our Finance and IT Services, Global Marketing and Sales Management as well as Human Resources are also located here. Fresh ideas are developed here every day, and together we turn them into success stories. Personal responsibility and networked work are particularly important to us. Want to be part of it too? Come and join us. ## Cosa puoi aspettarti • You design and deliver high-quality visual assets across digital, print, and brand touchpoints • You create original illustrations that reflect and evolve the brand’s illustration style • You contribute to graphic design development beyond illustration, supporting broader brand needs • You translate ideas, narratives, and messages into clear and engaging visual concepts • You ensure consistency with brand and visual guidelines across all deliverables • You review and assess market-developed design work across all graphic design disciplines, providing clear guidance to ensure alignment with brand standards, visual quality, and creative direction • You support markets by advising on best practices for working on brand and applying design systems correctly • You collaborate closely with brand, marketing, and content teams • You present creative work and recommendations clearly to internal stakeholders ## Requisiti • You have a minimum of 6 years of professional experience in graphic design • You have strong illustration skills with a portfolio demonstrating style consistency and adaptability • You have broad graphic design expertise across digital and print media • You have advanced proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite (Illustrator, Photoshop, InDesign) • You have experience with or a strong interest in AI-powered creative tools and workflows, and can apply them effectively in a design context • You have an excellent understanding of typography, layout, color, and composition • You have strong conceptual and visual storytelling skills • You have a high attention to detail and strong craft quality • You can balance creative expression with brand consistency • You have professional proficiency in English; German is an advantage ## Cosa offriamo • An exciting working environment with motivated colleagues • A position with lots of personal responsibility • The opportunity to contribute fresh ideas • An open and respectful feedback culture • In-house and external further training • Unique career opportunities • Generous discounts on our products • Chocolate at work ## Contatto Own it. Grow it. Make it fresh. Sounds interesting? Then come join us. Emilija Minova , Head Talent Acquisition/Employer Branding, will be happy to answer your questions.

descriptionByLocale.it: Il cioccolato fresco e di alta qualità – è questo che rappresenta la manifattura svizzera di cioccolato Läderach. Fondata nel 1962, questa azienda familiare impiega oggi più di 2500 persone originarie di oltre 80 paesi, con una tendenza al aumento. Lo stabilimento dell'azienda si trova nel cantone di Glaris. È in questo contesto pittoresco delle Alpi che produciamo il nostro cioccolato fresco e che sviluppiamo senza sosta, in equipe agile, nuove idee creative. La divisione "Retail" comprende più di 230 cioccolaterie distribuite in oltre 25 paesi. Noi vi offriamo le nostre specialità cioccolatate e invitiamo la vostra clientela a scoprire nuovamente senza sosta il piacere del cioccolato fresco. Hai l'opportunità di effettuare una formazione EFZ di più anni nel commercio al dettaglio, in una delle nostre cioccolaterie in Svizzera. Lì imparerai a consigliare la clientela in modo professionale, a decorare vetrine e reparti, e a organizzare diversi processi di lavoro. Ti insegneremo le regole di igiene, la legislazione alimentare e il sistema di ordini. Vuoi scoprire il mondo professionale e imparare nuove cose? Allora unisciti a noi. Ciò che ti aspetta Sarai sostenuto e accompagnato dai nostri servizi durante la transizione tra la scuola e il mondo professionale Sarai accompagnato da un servizio individuale e personalizzato dai nostri responsabili di negozio Sarai accompagnato da una formazione varia e incentrata sulla pratica, con ottimi prospetti di futuro Das porti con te Ti piace il cioccolato Hai completato la scuola secondaria (livello A) o hai un buon diploma di scuola secondaria (livello B) Impari velocemente e preferisci un ambiente dinamico Apprezzi il contatto con le persone e sei comunicativo/a Apprezzi un lavoro curato e la affidabilità Own it. Grow it. Make it fresh. Ti interessa? Allora
descriptionByLocale.en: Fresh and high-quality chocolate – that's what the Swiss chocolate manufacturer Läderach represents. Founded in 1962, this family-owned business now employs over 2500 people from more than 80 countries, with a growing trend. The company's headquarters are located in the canton of Glaris. It's in this picturesque Alpine setting that we produce our fresh chocolate and continuously develop, in agile teams, new creative ideas. The "Retail" division comprises over 230 chocolate shops in more than 25 countries. We offer our chocolate specialties and invite our customers to rediscover the pleasure of fresh chocolate again and again. You have the opportunity to complete a several-year EFZ training in retail trade, in one of our chocolate shops in Switzerland. There, you will learn to advise customers professionally, to decorate shop windows and shelves, and to organize various work processes. We will teach you the hygiene rules, food legislation, and the order system. Want to discover the professional world and learn new things? Then join us. What awaits you You will be supported and accompanied by our services during the transition from school to the professional world You will benefit from individual and personalized support by our store managers You will benefit from a varied and practice-oriented training, with excellent future prospects Das brings you with You like chocolate You have completed secondary school (level A) or have a good secondary school diploma (level B) You learn quickly and prefer a dynamic environment You appreciate contact with people and are communicative You attach importance to a well-done job and reliability Own it. Grow it. Make it fresh. Is that interesting? Then send your application to us. Deborah Mathey, apprentice manager, is happy to answer any questions at +41 27 321 23 77.
descriptionByLocale.de: Frischer und hochwertiger Schokoladen – das ist, was die Schweizer Schokoladenfabrik Läderach darstellt. Gegründet 1962, ist diese Familienunternehmen heute über 2500 Mitarbeiter aus mehr als 80 Ländern beschäftigt, mit einer steigenden Tendenz. Das Unternehmen hat seinen Hauptsitz im Kanton Glaris. Es ist in diesem pittoresken Alpenlandschaft, dass wir unseren frischen Schokoladen produzieren und ständig neue kreative Ideen entwickeln, in agilen Teams. Die "Retail"-Division umfasst über 230 Schokoladenläden in mehr als 25 Ländern. Wir bieten unsere Schokoladen-Spezialitäten an und laden unsere Kunden ein, den Genuss frischer Schokolade wieder und wieder zu entdecken. Du hast die Gelegenheit, eine mehrjährige EFZ-Ausbildung im Einzelhandel, in einem unserer Schokoladenläden in der Schweiz, zu absolvieren. Dort wirst du lernen, Kunden professionell zu beraten, Schaufenster und Regale zu dekorieren und verschiedene Arbeitsprozesse zu organisieren. Wir werden dir die Hygienerichtlinien, die Lebensmittelgesetze und das Bestellsystem beibringen. Willst du die Berufs- und Lernwelt entdecken und neue Dinge lernen? Dann komm zu uns. descriptionByLocale.en: High-quality, fresh chocolate - that's what the Swiss chocolate manufacturer Läderach stands for. Founded in 1962, the family-owned company today employs over 2500 people from more than 80 countries, with a growing trend. The company's headquarters is located in the canton of Glarus. With a picturesque Alpine backdrop, we produce our fresh chocolates here and constantly develop new, creative ideas in agile teams. In our «Corporate Functions» department, various activities are bundled. In addition to our finance and IT services, this department also includes global marketing and sales management, as well as human resources. Fresh ideas are born here every day, which we bring to success together. Self-responsibility and networked work are particularly important to us. Do you want to be part of it? Then come to us. This is what you can expect You will develop and implement a global strategy for store development that is aligned with growth targets, and monitor new openings and renovations within budget and timelines. You will lead the global store development community, define and manage processes for store openings, and ensure effective implementation in line with regional requirements. You will drive cost efficiency through strategic procurement and supplier management, and ensure that budgets are adhered to without compromising quality. You will build strong relationships with internal and external stakeholders and act as a central point of contact for initiatives in the field of store development. You will define metrics to evaluate project success, report progress to top management, and integrate insights gained for continuous improvement. You will ensure effective maintenance of stores and adherence to organizational standards. What you bring with you You have completed studies in architecture or a related field and have 8-10 years of experience in global store development, ideally in the premium or food sector. You have at least 5 years of leadership experience and can demonstrate a track record of success with strong results. You are exceptionally good at managing complex projects with multiple stakeholders across various regions. You have excellent organizational skills, very good communication skills in English and German, and in-depth knowledge of AutoCAD, Office 365, and MS Office. You are resilient, adaptable, and able to work independently while effectively leading cross-functional teams. You are willing to travel internationally (up to 30%) and open to innovative approaches. What we offer you A stimulating work environment with motivated colleagues. A position with a high degree of self-responsibility. The opportunity to bring fresh ideas. An open and respectful feedback culture. Internal and external training. Individual career opportunities. Generous discounts on our products. Chocolate at the workplace. Free parking. Benefits in the Läderach café and staff restaurant. Own it. Grow it. Make it fresh. Sounds interesting? Then apply with us. Emilija Minova, Head Talent Acquisition & Employer Branding, is available to answer your questions. We kindly request that you understand that we do not consider external recruitment agencies for this position.
descriptionByLocale.fr: Chocolat frais de haute qualité - c'est pour cela que la manufacture de chocolat suisse Läderach est connue. Fondée en 1962, l'entreprise familiale emploie aujourd'hui plus de 2500 personnes de plus de 80 pays, avec une tendance à la hausse. Le siège social de l'entreprise est situé dans le canton de Glarus. Avec un arrière-plan alpin pittoresque, nous produisons ici nos chocolats frais et développons constamment de nouvelles idées créatives en équipes agiles. Dans notre département « Corporate Functions », diverses activités sont regroupées. Outre nos services financiers et informatiques, ce département comprend également la gestion globale du marketing et des ventes, ainsi que les ressources humaines. Des idées fraîches naissent ici chaque jour, que nous portons à succès ensemble. La responsabilité personnelle et le travail en réseau sont particulièrement importants pour nous. Veux-tu en faire partie ? Alors viens à nous. Voici ce que tu peux attendre Tu développeras et mettras en œuvre une stratégie globale pour le développement des magasins, qui est alignée sur les objectifs de croissance, et tu surveilleras les nouvelles ouvertures et rénovations dans le cadre des budgets et des délais. Tu dirigeras la communauté mondiale de développement des magasins, tu définira et géreras les processus d'ouverture des magasins et tu assureras une mise en œuvre efficace conformément aux exigences régionales. Tu feras progresser l'efficacité des coûts grâce à l'achat stratégique et à la gestion des fournisseurs, et tu assureras que les budgets soient respectés sans compromettre la qualité. Tu construiras des relations solides avec les parties prenantes internes et externes et tu agiras en tant que personne de référence centrale pour les initiatives dans le domaine du développement des magasins. Tu définira des indicateurs pour évaluer le succès du projet, tu rendras compte des progrès à la direction et tu intégrera les connaissances acquises pour une amélioration continue. Tu assureras une maintenance efficace des magasins et le respect des normes organisationnelles. Ce que tu apportes avec toi Tu as terminé tes études d'architecture ou d'un domaine connexe et tu as 8-10 ans d'expérience dans le développement mondial des magasins, idéalement dans le secteur premium ou alimentaire. Tu as au moins 5 ans d'expérience de leadership et tu peux démontrer un bilan de succès avec des résultats solides. Tu es exceptionnellement doué pour gérer des projets complexes avec de multiples parties prenantes à travers diverses régions. Tu as d'excellentes compétences organisationnelles, de très bonnes compétences en communication en anglais et en allemand, et une connaissance approfondie d'AutoCAD, Office 365 et MS Office. Tu es résilient, adaptable et capable de travailler de manière indépendante tout en dirigeant efficacement des équipes interfonctionnelles. Tu es prêt à voyager à l'international (jusqu'à 30%) et ouvert à des approches innovantes. Ce que nous t'offrons Un environnement de travail stimulant avec des collègues motivés. Un poste avec un degré élevé de responsabilité personnelle. La possibilité de faire avancer des idées fraîches. Une culture du feedback ouverte et respectueuse. Formation interne et externe. Possibilités de carrière individuelles. Remises généreuses sur nos produits. Chocolat sur le lieu de travail. Parkings gratuits. Avantages au café Läderach et au restaurant du personnel. Own it. Grow it. Make it fresh. Cela te semble intéressant ? Alors postule chez nous. Emilija Minova, Head Talent Acquisition & Employer Branding, est à ta disposition pour répondre à tes questions. Nous te demandons de comprendre que nous ne prenons pas en compte les agences de recrutement externes pour ce poste.
